---
title: "Progress Brief"
subtitle: "CHW Interventions for Maternal Mental Health in LMICs"
author:
  - name: "Demo Researcher, PhD, MPH"
    email: "demo@example.org"
    corresponding: true
date: "2026-03-12"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    self-contained: true
  docx:
    toc: false
---

# Project Status

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Current Phase** | Data Synthesis |
| **Start Date** | March 1, 2026 |
| **Target Completion** | September 30, 2026 |
| **Reporting Standard** | PRISMA 2020 |

# Phase Progress

| Phase | Status | Milestones | Target End |
|-------|--------|:----------:|-----------|
| 1. Planning & Protocol | Completed | 3/3 | March 2026 |
| 2. Search Execution | Completed | 2/2 | March 2026 |
| 3. Screening | Completed | 3/3 | April 2026 |
| 4. Data Extraction | Completed | 2/2 | May 2026 |
| 5. Data Synthesis | In Progress | 1/3 | July 2026 |
| 6. Manuscript Preparation | Not Started | 0/3 | August 2026 |
| 7. Submission | Not Started | 0/2 | September 2026 |

# Recent Accomplishments

- PICO framework defined and approved (Phase 1)
- Protocol drafted and submitted to PROSPERO (Phase 1)
- Search strategy executed across 5 databases — 1,247 records retrieved (Phase 2)
- Title/abstract screening completed — 935 records screened, 88 advanced (Phase 3)
- Full-text screening completed — 23 studies included (Phase 3)
- Data extraction completed for all 23 studies (Phase 4)
- Random-effects meta-analysis script generated and initial run completed (Phase 5)

# Key Results (Preliminary)

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Studies included (qualitative) | 23 |
| Studies in meta-analysis | 18 |
| Total participants | 9,847 |
| Countries represented | 14 |
| Pooled SMD (Hedges' g) | −0.42 (95% CI [−0.56, −0.28]) |
| Heterogeneity (I²) | 58% |

# Blockers

- No current blockers.

# Recent Decisions

- **Random-effects model with REML** (2026-03-07): Chosen over fixed-effects due to expected clinical and methodological heterogeneity across LMICs.
- **Hedges' g as effect measure** (2026-03-07): Standardized mean difference preferred because studies used different depression instruments (EPDS, PHQ-9).
- **Include quasi-experimental studies** (2026-03-05): Two quasi-experimental studies included to maximize evidence base; noted in limitations.

# Next Steps

1. Complete subgroup analyses (by intervention type, delivery format, income level)
2. Finalize sensitivity analyses (leave-one-out, exclude high RoB)
3. Assess publication bias (funnel plot, Egger's test)
4. GRADE evidence quality assessment
5. Draft manuscript Discussion and Conclusions sections
6. Internal review of complete manuscript

# Timeline Status

```{mermaid}
gantt
    title Systematic Review Timeline
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat %b %Y

    section Planning
    Protocol development     :done, 2026-03-01, 2026-03-01
    PROSPERO registration    :done, 2026-03-01, 2026-03-02

    section Search
    Database searches        :done, 2026-03-02, 2026-03-02
    Grey literature          :done, 2026-03-03, 2026-03-03

    section Screening
    Title/abstract screening :done, 2026-03-02, 2026-03-04
    Full-text screening      :done, 2026-03-04, 2026-03-05

    section Extraction
    Data extraction          :done, 2026-03-05, 2026-03-07
    Risk of bias assessment  :done, 2026-03-06, 2026-03-07

    section Synthesis
    Meta-analysis            :active, 2026-03-08, 2026-03-20
    Subgroup analyses        :2026-03-15, 2026-03-25
    GRADE assessment         :2026-03-20, 2026-04-05

    section Manuscript
    Draft writing            :2026-04-01, 2026-05-15
    Internal review          :2026-05-15, 2026-06-15
    Revisions                :2026-06-15, 2026-07-31

    section Submission
    Journal submission       :2026-08-01, 2026-09-30
```

---

*This brief was generated with assistance from the Research Workflow Assistant (`@project-manager` agent). All project data was entered and verified by the research team.*
